title: Huawei S220S-24P4J Gigabit PoE switch, 4x 2.5G SFP
description: Huawei S220S-24P4J is a manageable L2 switch equipped with 24x 1Gbit Ethernet with PoE+ support and 4x 2.5G SFP ports . The total PoE budget is 400W , ensuring reliable power for 24 devices under the 802.3af standard or 13 devices under the 802.3at standard with full power consumption. It supports all common L2 features and extensive management options, including management via the Huawei eKit App , enabling cloud management. With the Huawei Online Upgrade Platform (HOUP) service, the switch… The Huawei eKitEngine S220S series switches are L2 GE/10GE designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs). Advanced features, high reliability, extensive device management options, rack mounting, built-in 230V AC power supply, and fanless design enable use in various installation scenarios Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (4) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads
